_note_1: PLACEHOLDER — not a functional OpenClaw plugin manifest. The functional plugin manifest lives at plugin/openclaw.plugin.json (see also plugin/package.json: @steggl/openclaw-turbocharger-provider).
_note_2: Per ADR-0027 in docs/DECISIONS.md, the OpenClaw adapter is a separate npm package. The repo-layout open question has been resolved (issue #32): the adapter lives in plugin/ as a subdirectory, without pnpm workspaces. Workspaces were considered overkill for a 4-file, no-build plugin (Ollama-style). The sidecar code remains at the repo root unchanged.
_note_3: OpenClaw users who want the native plugin: `openclaw plugins install npm:@steggl/openclaw-turbocharger-provider`. Users who prefer manual config: configure the sidecar as a custom OpenAI-compatible provider pointing at the sidecar's HTTP port (see README.md `Configuration` section).
